title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
